summary: Stress-test Founder OS: invent a venture in a chosen archetype, run the whole OS on it (all 15 domains, reading the real skill files), adversarially audit the result against the OS’s own promises, then apply safe fixes + propose substantive ones.

result.synthesis:
The ledger was created (it's a data ledger, not a report file, so it passed). The `findings.md` write was blocked by an environment guard on report files, which directs me to return that content as text — so the full report is below, led by the four required return items.

---

# Founder OS Hardening — Synthesis (run_20260713_032623)

## Note on deliverables
- **`evals/HARDENING_LEDGER.md`** — created (with header) and first row appended. ✅
- **`undefined/findings.md`** — the environment blocks writing findings/report `.md` files and instructs returning the content inline; the full report is in this response. The `undefined/` dir was created but the report body lives here (the parent workflow parses this text, not a file).

## Headline counts
- **Raw findings:** 60 — critical 3 · high 16 · medium 22 · low 19
- **Unique after dedup/merge:** 43 (17 duplicate/self-correcting entries consolidated)
- **Auto-fixed (safe, applied):** 3
- **Proposed (needs approval):** 40
- **Dropped as wholly wrong:** 0 (2 over-reaching sub-claims tempered; 3 auditor self-corrections folded — details below)

## Files I auto-edited (exactly these 3 skill/doc files; 5 edits total)
1. **`/home/claude/founder-os/FOUNDER_OS_MASTER_ARCHITECTURE.md`** — 3 edits: (a) v1.0 changelog L81 scope note; (b) L25 domain-10 contract-set list; (c) L80 build-program legal-pack line.
2. **`/home/claude/founder-os/commands/founder.md`** — 1 edit: L34 legal contract-set list.
3. **`/home/claude/founder-os/skills/fable-brief/SKILL.md`** — 2 edits: Load-first #7 and the composition table both now include `metrics-dashboard`.

(Plus created `/home/claude/founder-os/evals/HARDENING_LEDGER.md`.)

## Top 5 most important findings
1. **[CRITICAL] §9 compliance matrix has no physical-product/safety regime** — `docs/engineering-backbone.md` §9 (+ `skills/legal-pack/SKILL.md` L33). Only GDPR/HIPAA/LegitScript/PCI/SOC2; legal-pack "consume §9, do not re-derive" propagates it. No product-liability insurance, ASTM burn-test, FPLA/FDA labeling, IFRA, hazmat, Prop 65, or FTC Green Guides — a safety/liability hole for a fire-risk product. *(3 auditors)*
2. **[CRITICAL] finance-ops COA has no inventory / goods-COGS / cash-conversion cycle** — `skills/finance-ops/references/method.md` §2/§7. No inventory asset, digital-only COGS, runway = cash ÷ burn with no working-capital-for-inventory. Books structurally wrong for any goods venture. *(2 auditors)*
3. **[HIGH] "Build = software" is hard-coded into the spine** — `FOUNDER_OS_MASTER_ARCHITECTURE.md` domains 2/3/15 + sole `starters/saas`. The root leak every output works around; nudges toward Tony's #1 failure mode (needless custom build).
4. **[HIGH] Customer-facing claims guardrail hard-coded to Executive Edge's health regime** — `skills/direct-response-copy/SKILL.md` L45-46 + ~14 sibling skills. Rx/peptide/GLP/LegitScript/"physician review"/roster-dashboard text repeated verbatim; contradicts the OS's stated industry-agnosticism.
5. **[HIGH] Go-live gate = "switch Stripe to live keys"; fable DoD unmeetable with no N/A path** — `docs/engineering-backbone.md` L29-60 + `skills/fable-brief/SKILL.md` L65/L69. Inapplicable to hosted-storefront/buy-not-build; real launch gates (insurance/safety/labeling/margin) absent. *(2 auditors)*

*(Honorable mention — two HIGH correctness bugs in this run's output that would ship a broken plan: P-O1 a quarterly 2-pack refill nets ~$5/shipment, below the venture's own $8 kill-floor; P-O2 the day-30 delivered-margin kill check is impossible behind an 8-12-wk ceramic lead.)*

## The one systemic weakness
**Industry-agnosticism is asserted, not built.** Founder OS is a well-engineered *SaaS* operating system with an agnostic label. The SaaS assumption is welded into the load-bearing spine — the domain contract (Build = deployed software), the only starter (`saas`), the compliance source-of-truth (§9), the go-live gate (Stripe live keys), the accounting core (no inventory), KPI defaults (MRR), the default tool stack (no commerce), the CRM (B2B deal ladder), even the claims guardrail (EE's health register). This physical-goods run's outputs came out mostly right **only because the harness prompts and venture context re-encoded the physical framing** — every correct output was a *workaround over a SaaS default*, never the default itself. A founder running these skills unaided on a non-software venture would be aimed at the wrong compliance regime (a safety hole for a fire-risk product), structurally wrong books, and a needless codebase. The fix is one principle at the spine: **every default — build shape, regime, money model, tool, pipeline, claims register — must be read from the venture context, with SaaS as one selectable archetype, not the baked-in path.**

---

# FULL REPORT (contents intended for undefined/findings.md)

**Dedup/drop note.** The auditors were disciplined — no finding was wholly wrong. I merged 14 duplicate pairs/triples and folded 3 findings that were themselves *self-corrections* of over-reach in the run's own output friction-logs, all independently verified: (1) "Shopify isn't even named" is false — `docs/tool-mcp-stack.md` L67 names it (as a swap bullet); (2) "no physical-key recovery" is false — `org-roles` method L142 has "Recover assets (laptop, hardware keys, physical access)"; (3) the MRR money-strip root is `finance-ops`+`metrics-dashboard`, not `analytics-stack` (the most agnostic skill, which ships a restaurant example and defers definitions). I used those to **temper 2 over-reaching sub-claims** while keeping their valid kernels.

## AUTO-FIXED (safe) — applied this run

**AF-1 · Architecture changelog overstates validated agnosticism** — `FOUNDER_OS_MASTER_ARCHITECTURE.md` L81. Appended scope note: "…legal contract library de-SaaS'd — scope note: the contract *library* only; the §9 compliance-regime matrix, the sole `starters/saas` build starter, and the finance/metrics money defaults remain SaaS-shaped and are pending an industry-agnostic pass)."

**AF-2 · Stale legal contract-set description** — `commands/founder.md` L34; `FOUNDER_OS_MASTER_ARCHITECTURE.md` L25 & L80. `legal-pack/references/method.md` Area 2 carries a model-specific goods block; the three canonical descriptions listed only the SaaS/services set. Appended "+ model-specific goods/retail: lease · supply · sale-of-goods · IP-license" to all three.

**AF-3 · fable-brief SKILL.md omitted `metrics-dashboard`** — `skills/fable-brief/SKILL.md` Load-first #7 + composition table. `references/method.md` L49 lists it as a WS-C source; SKILL.md did not. Added it to Load-first #7 (KPI tree consumed under WS-C) and as a composition-table row ("mark prerequisite — run `metrics-dashboard` (or consumed via `analytics-stack`)").

## PROPOSED (needs Tony's approval)

### A. OS systemic — the industry-agnosticism gaps

**P-C1 · [CRITICAL] §9 has no physical-product regime; legal-pack inherits it.** Files: `docs/engineering-backbone.md` §9 (L308-314); `skills/legal-pack/SKILL.md` L33; `skills/legal-pack/references/method.md` Area 4. Defect: §9 (the single source of truth, consumed verbatim) contains only GDPR/CCPA, HIPAA, LegitScript, PCI-DSS, SOC2; legal-pack says "consume §9, do not re-derive," so product-liability insurance, ASTM F2417/F2058, FPLA/FDA cosmetic, IFRA, DOT/IATA hazmat, Prop 65, FTC Green Guides can never surface. Evidence: verified §9 rows all digital; grep for physical-regime terms across backbone+legal+finance = 0; run's 03 F13/04 P13 caught it only by overriding "consume §9." Fix: add a physical/manufactured/consumer-goods regime block (applies-when · control · gate) stated agnostically ("read from the venture's regulatory surface"); change legal-pack to "consume §9 AND add any regimes it lacks for this industry"; add product-liability insurance as a launch gate + goods rows to Area 5 split and attorney-gate list.

**P-C2 · [CRITICAL] finance-ops COA has no inventory/goods-COGS/CCC.** File: `skills/finance-ops/references/method.md` §2 (L30/L34), §7 (L89), tax §6. Defect: Assets have no inventory; COGS is digital-only; runway = cash ÷ burn (no DIO/DSO/DPO, no inventory working-capital); tax foregrounds R&D §41/§174 and "SaaS is taxable" with no marketplace-facilitator. Evidence: verified COA/runway lines; SaaS worked example. Fix: add inventory asset block + goods-COGS/fulfillment block (materials, freight-in, landed cost, production labor, shipping, pick-pack, breakage) as first-class rows; add a cash-conversion-cycle/working-capital module to §7; add commerce→ledger bridge + destination sales-tax + marketplace-facilitator; make §41/§174 conditional; add a goods worked example.

**P-H1 · [HIGH] "Build = software" hard-coded in the 15-domain contract.** Files: `FOUNDER_OS_MASTER_ARCHITECTURE.md` domains 2/3/15 + L64; `starters/` (only `saas`). Defect: domain 2 = "spec → deployed, tested software," domains 3/15 code-centric, sole `saas` starter — forces a codebase; outputs work around it (WS-J, buy-not-build) but never escalate. Fix: reword domain 2 to "the sellable product realized and validated (software / physical / service)"; make domain 15 "code-PR OR config/ops-PR"; add a commerce/physical/buy-not-build starter (or a starter-selection step).

**P-H2 · [HIGH] venture-bootstrap has no build-vs-buy gate.** File: `skills/venture-bootstrap/references/method.md` §1/§2/§6. Defect: every stack rung is React/Vite/Supabase/Stripe; scaffold hard-codes `src/`/`supabase/functions/`/migrations/`vite.config.ts`; milestone = "live URL + one Stripe test transaction." "Configure Shopify, don't scaffold" is inexpressible. Fix: add a build-vs-buy step-0 with a commerce/off-the-shelf branch; add a non-code "first real transaction" milestone variant; mark the SaaS scaffold as one archetype.

**P-H3 · [HIGH] Stripe-live-keys go-live gate; fable DoD unmeetable, no N/A path.** Files: `docs/engineering-backbone.md` L29-60; `skills/fable-brief/SKILL.md` L65/L69. Defect: gate = "not cleared to switch Stripe to live keys" on Supabase/RLS/verify_jwt; fable makes it whole-brief DoD with "every minimum-bar box → a PR or gate," no N/A. Real gates (insurance/safety/labeling/margin) absent. Evidence: verified L31/L34/L36. Fix: regime-driven "take-money readiness" gate reading the venture's processor + compliance set; allow minimum-bar boxes "N/A (reason)."

**P-H4 · [HIGH] Money strip / KPIs default to MRR/NRR/CAC-payback.** Files: `skills/metrics-dashboard/references/method.md` Step 1/Step 4; `skills/finance-ops/references/method.md` §9; secondary `skills/analytics-stack/SKILL.md`. Defect: metrics-dashboard hard-codes MRR/NRR/CAC + "app db"/Stripe sourcing; finance-ops §9 mirrors it. analytics-stack correctly defers (agnostic, restaurant example) — fix belongs upstream (this corrects the run's P22-25 mis-attribution). Fix: model-dependent money-strip examples (subscription / goods-repeat / services) and "system of record (product DB, commerce platform, POS, or ledger)" sourcing; neutralize residual example text in analytics-stack.

**P-H5 · [HIGH] sales-crm is a fixed B2B deal ladder.** Files: `skills/sales-crm/SKILL.md` L20/L33; `references/method.md` stages L71-74. Defect: Demo→Proposal→Negotiation→Closed-Won, no sample/line-sheet stage, no reorder/repeat motion, no self-serve-outside-CRM, no marketplace-facilitator. Fix: model-selected stage template with reorder + sample stages; "Won" per model; marketplace-facilitator channel; state self-serve/commerce revenue lives outside the CRM.

**P-H6 · [HIGH] tool-mcp-stack master table + 72h stack omit commerce tooling.** File: `docs/tool-mcp-stack.md` L32-59/L67/L122-136/L38. Defect: subscriptions→Stripe reflex; SaaS-eight 72h stack has no storefront/inventory/fulfillment; e-commerce is one under-specified swap bullet. Evidence: verified L67 is the only Shopify mention (a bullet, not a row — the accurate form of the over-reaching "isn't even named"). Fix: first-class rows for subscription-commerce (Skio/Recharge), storefront/tax (Shopify), fulfillment (3PL/ShipStation), wholesale (Faire); separate SaaS-Stripe-Billing from commerce-subscription-on-order; model-specific 72h stack.

**P-H7 · [HIGH] product-spec + fable PR template mandate RLS/verify_jwt; no config-PR shape.** Files: `skills/product-spec/references/method.md` §4/§5/§7; `skills/fable-brief/references/method.md` template L89-128. Defect: RLS-per-table and verify_jwt are primary mandatory fields; config-PR is a parenthetical; per-PR security defaults to RLS/verify_jwt → rubber-stamped "N/A" for bought-tooling ventures. Fix: promote config-PR to a first-class template variant (tool schema · automations · manual-QA/one-real-transaction acceptance · vendor-config security = scope/MFA/DPA/drafts-only); make the security checklist select the surface; reframe ownership as "per-user RLS / internal-service-token / vendor-held."

**P-H8 · [HIGH] fable workstream taxonomy has no physical-ops workstream.** File: `skills/fable-brief/references/method.md` L45-58. Defect: fixed nine (A-I); "WS-A/WS-B are the critical path"; no manufacturing/QA-safety/inventory/fulfillment WS (run invented WS-J; real critical path was procurement+compliance+fulfillment). Fix: add a considered-by-default "Physical Operations & Supply Chain" WS; change to "critical path is venture-dependent — name it."

**P-H9 · [HIGH] Claims guardrail hard-coded to EE's health regime across ~15 skills.** Files: `skills/direct-response-copy/SKILL.md` L45-46 + `paid-ads`, `landing-funnel`, `seo-geo`, `content-engine`, `social-media`, `sales-crm`, `lead-response`, `positioning`. Defect: "any Rx/peptide/GLP or health claim must be LegitScript-reviewed — never 'physician review'/'medical team'" + roster-dashboard rule, repeated verbatim; contradicts PROFILE.md agnosticism; for candles the real surface is FDA cosmetic-vs-drug + aromatherapy + FTC. Evidence: verified the text spread across 15+ skill files. Fix: replace with "never state medical/legal/financial claims without review; pull the claims surface + banned register from the venture context"; move EE specifics into EE's venture context.

**P-M1 · [MEDIUM] legal-pack de-SaaS half-done.** Files: `skills/legal-pack/SKILL.md` L40/L48; `references/method.md` Area 5 L122-131 + gate list L141-152. Defect: contract *library* has the goods block, but SKILL.md set, Area 5 split, and attorney-gate list stay ToS/DPA/MSA-centric; no product-liability insurance; auto-renewal (CA ARL/FTC Click-to-Cancel) only in passing. Fix: add goods/lease/supply/co-man/3PL/wholesale rows to SKILL.md set + Area 5 + gate list; add insurance as a launch gate; elevate auto-renewal to a first-class regime for subscription-DTC.

**P-M2 · [MEDIUM] org-roles has no manufacturing/fulfillment function or physical-access dimension.** Files: `skills/org-roles/SKILL.md` L41/L43; `references/method.md` L22/L63/L86-92/L142; `docs/engineering-backbone.md` §10. Defect: manufacturing/QA/fulfillment collapsed into "product/eng"; RACI default = deploy-to-prod; permissions matrix digital-only, no physical-access dimension. *Tempered:* offboarding is not missing physical-key recovery (L142 has a generic "physical access" line) — it is just not premises/inventory-specific. Fix: add production/fulfillment functions; model-select the RACI process list; add a physical-access dimension; make offboarding's physical line premises/inventory-specific.

**P-M3 · [MEDIUM] opportunity-size assumes collection lags booked; no inventory working-capital.** File: `skills/opportunity-size/references/method.md` L4/L21-29/L61. Defect: "collected over booked" (deposits/terms) is a services/SaaS assumption; for DTC cash is at purchase and the real risk is capital committed to inventory before any sale; the bottoms-up formula has no COGS/inventory-cash term. Fix: generalize the cash note ("collected can lag OR lead booked; inventory businesses are worse — WC committed ahead of demand") and cap the range by production/inventory-cash capacity.

**P-M4 · [MEDIUM] support-success is SaaS-support-shaped.** Files: `skills/support-success/SKILL.md` L35/L36; `references/method.md` L15-17/L38/L104. Defect: Intercom/Zendesk defaults; S1 = service-down/data-loss (safety a bare word); dated T-90→QBR→T-30 renewal; in-product activation. No goods helpdesk (Gorgias), breakage/WISMO/returns tiers, product-safety/recall S1 lane, or continuous-churn motion. Fix: add an e-commerce/goods archetype (order-integrated helpdesk; breakage/WISMO/returns tiers; product-safety/injury/recall S1 lane → founder+legal+insurer, CPSC, no-fault/no-public-comment) + a continuous churn-prevention motion.

**P-M5 · [MEDIUM] analytics-stack presumes an app SDK.** File: `skills/analytics-stack/SKILL.md` step 2. Defect: object_action/super-properties/PostHog-flag model with no no-SDK/consumed-events path (Shopify/Klaviyo) and no physical/offline experiment type. (Money-strip half reassigned to P-H4.) Fix: add a consumed-events instrumentation path + offline experiments as a valid test type.

**P-M6 · [MEDIUM] fable coverage matrix lacks "N/A (reason)" for backbone controls.** File: `skills/fable-brief/references/method.md` completeness protocol + `SKILL.md` L69. Defect: domain inputs get four dispositions but backbone controls get only "PR/WS/gate or it's a hole"; for buy-not-build most controls (RLS/verify_jwt/CORS/backups/CI) are inapplicable → fabricate work or false hole. Fix: add an "N/A (reason)" disposition symmetric with the domain-input protocol.

**P-M7 · [MEDIUM] offer-architect skips guardrails; guardrails.md omits financial claims.** Files: `skills/offer-architect/SKILL.md` Load-first L16-18 + Rules L38-41; `founder-profile/guardrails.md` L28-30. Defect: the money skill loads no guardrails and has no illustrative/confirm-live/not-advice rule; guardrails.md's claims rule omits financial claims. Fix: add guardrails.md to offer-architect Load-first + an "economics are illustrative, not advice, confirm-live, flag CPA" rule; amend guardrails.md to "no medical, legal, or financial claims without review" + a financial-figures-illustrative line.

**P-L1 · [LOW] fable human-gate taxonomy has no physical/procurement/safety class.** `skills/fable-brief/SKILL.md` L73 + method template. Add a class for MOQ commitment, lease/personal-guaranty, product-safety/recall.

**P-L2 · [LOW] offer-architect "high-ticket backend = where profit is" framed as general truth.** `skills/offer-architect/references/method.md` L17. Reword to "(where present)… recurring-consumable/physical may have none; profit in retained repeat purchase/LTV."

**P-L3 · [LOW] decision-standards default kill window (30 days) too short for subscription/repeat.** `founder-profile/decision-standards.md` L32. Reword to key off the revenue/retention cycle (≥2-3 cycles for subscription).

**P-L4 · [LOW] fable disposition set lacks "covered-within-a-sibling-artifact."** `skills/fable-brief/SKILL.md` composition L91 + method. Add a "covered-within-sibling (cite section)" disposition so a folded content-cadence isn't falsely flagged prerequisite.

### B. Harness / load-path (`evals/` out of auto-edit scope)

**P-X1 · [MEDIUM] `undefined/` output dir + broken venture-context path.** Files: `evals/hardening/harness.js` (`const runDir = args.runDir`, ~L13); every skill's Load-first #2; `new-venture` intake. Defect: no runDir default → literal `undefined/…` paths (verified in `01-concept.md` L7 `loads-after: … undefined/00-venture-idea.md`); the run never wrote `ventures/emberline/venture-context.md` (only ethos-hospitality + executive-edge exist), so the file that re-encodes the venture-specific claims guardrail (see P-H9) never resolves — a loader following Load-first literally could fall back to the EE-shaped rule. Fix: validate/derive runDir (fail fast, or default to `ventures/<slug>/`); write the intake to `ventures/<slug>/venture-context.md`; add a Load-first fallback for numbered-artifact run dirs.

### C. Output-artifact findings — this run's Emberline deliverables (run dir, not OS files)

- **P-O1 · [HIGH]** Refill default margin-ambiguous (`05-fable-brief.md` PR-4/PR-6): "quarterly 2-3 pack"; a 2-pack nets ~$5/shipment vs the $8 kill-floor. Pin to a 3-pack or mark PREREQUISITE; don't carry a range into a config AC.
- **P-O2 · [HIGH]** Day-30 kill check impossible (`05-fable-brief.md` PR-6): real pack-out gated behind 8-12-wk ceramic lead; PR-7 sandbox until PR-12. Use a dimensional freight quote + sample-vessel pack-out for day-30; reserve production-unit pack-out for PR-12.
- **P-O3 · [HIGH]** Compliance/insurance/TM placed post-launch but gates go-live (`05-fable-brief.md` PR-15 vs PR-12; also the `fable-brief` method phase model). Split PR-15's launch-gating subset into Phase 2 as a PR-12 dependency; fix the method phase model so compliance sign-off is a Phase-2 gate.
- **P-O4 · [MEDIUM]** Subscription mechanic specified two incompatible ways (PR-4 prepaid quarterly batch vs `02-gtm.md` §2.4 4/6/8-wk cadence-select). State the storefront exposes cadence but always ships a prepaid quarterly batch; supersede the raw 4/6/8-wk.
- **P-O5 · [MEDIUM]** Bogus-Gateway ≠ real pack-out (`05` PR-12; origin `03` §1 step 6). Distinguish the digital round-trip from the delivered-margin/physical proof.
- **P-O6 · [MEDIUM]** SKU set not enumerated (`05` PR-1/PR-3: "~3 colorways, ≤4 scents"; 00 lists 4-vs-6 open). Enumerate the launch SKU set or mark PREREQUISITE.
- **P-O7 · [MEDIUM]** "Self-contained" overstated (`05`): points back to 00-04 for tokens/prices/COA/Klaviyo flows. Inline the values or downgrade the claim.
- **P-O8 · [MEDIUM]** naming-brand never ran/dispositioned (`01`/`05`): Domain 1 marked fully CONSUMED; TM/domain/handle screen owed. Run it on "Emberline" or mark "N/A — name given; TM/domain screen still owed."
- **P-O9 · [MEDIUM]** metrics-dashboard never ran (`04`): north-star derived provisionally; two consumers inherit it. Run it; keep PREREQUISITE tags until then.
- **P-O10 · [LOW]** finance model deferred not built (`04`): output-contract component 2 (driver-based 12-month xlsx) delivered as a 7-row summary. Build the xlsx or scope it out with a reason.
- **P-O11 · [LOW]** seo-geo neither run nor dispositioned (`02`/`05`) while sibling channels + paid-ads/metrics-dashboard were. Add a one-line disposition or baseline on-site SEO.
- **P-O12 · [LOW]** DoD nominally satisfiable (`05` §6/4a): AC2/AC3/AC6 map only to conditional post-validation PR-18. Mark them webhook-only/N/A during the sprint; scope sprint DoD to AC1/AC5.
- **P-O13 · [LOW]** Validation budget stated two ways (`01`: $15-40k vs $8-20k hard-capped). Distinguish break-even fixed cost from the capped sprint ask.

### D. Mechanical fixes to run outputs (safe, but output files out of auto-edit scope)

- **P-Q1** (`02-gtm.md` L16): header mis-credits landing-funnel + metrics-dashboard as "already produced by 01." Attribute the funnel to 02 §2.4 + fable PR-10; remove metrics-dashboard from the list.
- **P-Q2** (`02-gtm.md` L18/L406/L408): "not green claims" header contradicted by two waste-reduction IG hooks. Reword to ownership/cost framing or tag for FTC Green Guides substantiation.
- **P-Q3** (`05-fable-brief.md` PR-9): GA4 "VITE-style" label — no Vite app; set via Shopify theme/Google channel, not a `VITE_` env var. Drop "VITE-style."
- **P-Q4** (`05-fable-brief.md` Phase 1): PR-6 depends on PR-7 but is numbered before it. Reorder, or add "execute per the dependency graph."
